_publications._publicationTitle: Sleep Disorders in Pediatric Patients Affected by Neurofibromatosis Type 1: Reports of a Questionnaire and an Apple Watch Sleep Assessment.

_contextSnippet: The time to sleep onset was comparable between groups (NF1: 18.2 ± 7.4 min; controls: 15.4 ± 6.1 min; p > 0.05)
details: Sleep onset time measurement showed no significant difference between groups (NF1: 18.2±7.4 min vs controls: 15.4±6.1 min, p>0.05)
